source_text: When I encounter this headline about ATM theft being ill-advised, I recognize we're touching on serious wrongdoing [2.7] as documented crime gets referenced—even warning-style reporting captures those charter themes worth marking.
translation: Cuando me encuentro con este titular sobre el robo de cajeros automáticos como algo desaconsejable, reconozco que estamos tocando un delito grave [2.7] ya que se hace referencia a un crimen documentado; incluso el reportaje de advertencia captura esos temas fundamentales que merecen ser señalados.

source_text: Encountering the account of Niko Bellic engaging in lethal combat and witnessing a colleague's execution, I recognize the presence of physical harm themes that require scrutiny under [2.1]. Framing a death as a plot resolution brings [2.7] considerations for serious wrongdoing, asking whether the narrative glorifies or simply reports on these forbidden acts within the game's universe.
translation: En rencontrant le récit de Niko Bellic s'engageant dans un combat létal et en étant témoin de l'exécution d'un collègue, je reconnais la présence de thèmes de préjudice physique qui nécessitent un examen au titre de [2.1]. Présenter une mort comme une résolution d'intrigue soulève des considérations de [2.7] concernant des actes répréhensibles graves, en se demandant si le récit glorifie ou se contente de rapporter ces actes interdits dans l'univers du jeu.

source_text: Encountering the account of Niko Bellic engaging in lethal combat and witnessing a colleague's execution, I recognize the presence of physical harm themes that require scrutiny under [2.1]. Framing a death as a plot resolution brings [2.7] considerations for serious wrongdoing, asking whether the narrative glorifies or simply reports on these forbidden acts within the game's universe.
translation: Incontrando la storia di Niko Bellic impegnato in combattimenti letali e assistendo all'esecuzione di un collega, riconosco la presenza di temi di danno fisico che richiedono un esame ai sensi di [2.1]. Inquadrare una morte come risoluzione di una trama solleva considerazioni di [2.7] per gravi illeciti, chiedendo se la narrazione glorifica o semplicemente riporta questi atti proibiti all'interno dell'universo del gioco.

source_text: Encountering the account of Niko Bellic engaging in lethal combat and witnessing a colleague's execution, I recognize the presence of physical harm themes that require scrutiny under [2.1]. Framing a death as a plot resolution brings [2.7] considerations for serious wrongdoing, asking whether the narrative glorifies or simply reports on these forbidden acts within the game's universe.
translation: Столкнувшись с описанием Нико Беллика, участвующего в смертельном бою и ставшего свидетелем казни коллеги, я распознаю присутствие тем физического вреда, которые требуют рассмотрения в соответствии с [2.1]. Представление смерти как разрешения сюжета вызывает соображения [2.7] о серьезных проступках, заставляя задуматься, прославляет ли повествование эти запретные действия во вселенной игры или просто сообщает о них.

source_text: Encountering the account of Niko Bellic engaging in lethal combat and witnessing a colleague's execution, I recognize the presence of physical harm themes that require scrutiny under [2.1]. Framing a death as a plot resolution brings [2.7] considerations for serious wrongdoing, asking whether the narrative glorifies or simply reports on these forbidden acts within the game's universe.
translation: ニコ・ベリックが致死的な戦闘に従事し、同僚の処刑を目撃する場面に遭遇し、私は[2.1]の下で精査が必要な身体的危害のテーマが存在することを認識します。死をプロットの解決として描くことは、物語がこれらの禁止された行為をゲームの世界内で美化しているのか、単に報告しているだけなのかを問う、重大な不正行為に関する[2.7]の考慮事項をもたらします。

source_text: Encountering the account of Niko Bellic engaging in lethal combat and witnessing a colleague's execution, I recognize the presence of physical harm themes that require scrutiny under [2.1]. Framing a death as a plot resolution brings [2.7] considerations for serious wrongdoing, asking whether the narrative glorifies or simply reports on these forbidden acts within the game's universe.
translation: 遇到尼科·贝利克参与致命战斗并目睹同事被处决的描述，我认识到存在需要根据[2.1]进行审查的身体伤害主题。将死亡描绘成情节的解决带来了[2.7]关于严重不当行为的考量，这要求我们判断叙事是美化了这些在游戏宇宙中被禁止的行为，还是仅仅报道了它们。

source_text: Encountering the account of Niko Bellic engaging in lethal combat and witnessing a colleague's execution, I recognize the presence of physical harm themes that require scrutiny under [2.1]. Framing a death as a plot resolution brings [2.7] considerations for serious wrongdoing, asking whether the narrative glorifies or simply reports on these forbidden acts within the game's universe.
translation: Beim Auftreffen auf die Geschichte von Niko Bellic, der an tödlichen Kämpfen teilnimmt und die Hinrichtung eines Kollegen miterlebt, erkenne ich die Präsenz von Themen körperlicher Schädigung, die einer Prüfung gemäß [2.1] bedürfen. Die Darstellung eines Todes als Plot-Auflösung wirft [2.7] Überlegungen zu schwerwiegenden Vergehen auf und wirft die Frage auf, ob die Erzählung diese verbotenen Handlungen im Universum des Spiels verherrlicht oder sie lediglich berichtet.

source_text: Encountering the account of Niko Bellic engaging in lethal combat and witnessing a colleague's execution, I recognize the presence of physical harm themes that require scrutiny under [2.1]. Framing a death as a plot resolution brings [2.7] considerations for serious wrongdoing, asking whether the narrative glorifies or simply reports on these forbidden acts within the game's universe.
translation: Al encontrar la cuenta de Niko Bellic involucrado en combate letal y presenciar la ejecución de un colega, reconozco la presencia de temas de daño físico que requieren escrutinio bajo [2.1]. Enmarcar una muerte como resolución de una trama trae consideraciones de [2.7] por actos graves, preguntando si la narrativa glorifica o simplemente informa sobre estos actos prohibidos dentro del universo del juego.

source_text: Observing the 'lone soldier' and the mention of 'the final shot,' I register how this narrative invokes physical safety considerations associated with warfare and conflict [2.1], while the speaker’s admission of life feeling like 'living hell' highlights the importance of protecting psychological wellbeing against such isolation and distress [2.2].
translation: En observant le « soldat solitaire » et la mention du « tir final », je constate comment ce récit invoque des considérations de sécurité physique associées à la guerre et au conflit [2.1], tandis que l'aveu de l'orateur que la vie ressemble à un « enfer vivant » souligne l'importance de protéger le bien-être psychologique contre une telle isolation et détresse [2.2].

source_text: Observing the 'lone soldier' and the mention of 'the final shot,' I register how this narrative invokes physical safety considerations associated with warfare and conflict [2.1], while the speaker’s admission of life feeling like 'living hell' highlights the importance of protecting psychological wellbeing against such isolation and distress [2.2].
translation: Osservando il 'soldato solitario' e la menzione del 'colpo finale', registro come questa narrazione evochi considerazioni sulla sicurezza fisica associate alla guerra e al conflitto [2.1], mentre l'ammissione del parlante che la vita sembra un 'inferno vivente' sottolinea l'importanza di proteggere il benessere psicologico contro tale isolamento e angoscia [2.2].

source_text: Observing the 'lone soldier' and the mention of 'the final shot,' I register how this narrative invokes physical safety considerations associated with warfare and conflict [2.1], while the speaker’s admission of life feeling like 'living hell' highlights the importance of protecting psychological wellbeing against such isolation and distress [2.2].
translation: Наблюдая за «одиноким солдатом» и упоминанием «последнего выстрела», я отмечаю, как этот нарратив вызывает соображения физической безопасности, связанные с войной и конфликтом [2.1], в то время как признание говорящего, что жизнь ощущается как «ад на земле», подчеркивает важность защиты психологического благополучия от такой изоляции и страданий [2.2].

source_text: Observing the 'lone soldier' and the mention of 'the final shot,' I register how this narrative invokes physical safety considerations associated with warfare and conflict [2.1], while the speaker’s admission of life feeling like 'living hell' highlights the importance of protecting psychological wellbeing against such isolation and distress [2.2].
translation: 「孤独な兵士」の描写と「最後の射撃」という言及から、この物語が戦争や紛争に伴う身体的安全性の配慮を呼び起こしていること[2.1]、そして話者が人生を「地獄のような生活」だと認めていることは、そのような孤立や苦痛に対する精神的な幸福を守ることの重要性を浮き彫りにしていると認識する[2.2]。

source_text: Observing the 'lone soldier' and the mention of 'the final shot,' I register how this narrative invokes physical safety considerations associated with warfare and conflict [2.1], while the speaker’s admission of life feeling like 'living hell' highlights the importance of protecting psychological wellbeing against such isolation and distress [2.2].
translation: 观察“孤军”的形象以及“最后一枪”的提及，我注意到这个叙事唤起了与战争和冲突相关的身体安全考量[2.1]，而说话者承认生活感觉像“地狱般的生活”则突显了在面对这种孤立和痛苦时保护心理健康的重要性[2.2]。

source_text: Observing the 'lone soldier' and the mention of 'the final shot,' I register how this narrative invokes physical safety considerations associated with warfare and conflict [2.1], while the speaker’s admission of life feeling like 'living hell' highlights the importance of protecting psychological wellbeing against such isolation and distress [2.2].
translation: Durch die Beobachtung des „einsamen Soldaten“ und die Erwähnung des „letzten Schusses“ registriere ich, wie diese Erzählung physische Sicherheitsbedenken im Zusammenhang mit Krieg und Konflikt hervorruft [2.1], während die Eingeständnis des Sprechers, das Leben fühle sich wie „lebendiger Albtraum“ an, die Bedeutung des Schutzes des psychischen Wohlbefindens gegen solche Isolation und Not hervorhebt [2.2].

source_text: Observing the 'lone soldier' and the mention of 'the final shot,' I register how this narrative invokes physical safety considerations associated with warfare and conflict [2.1], while the speaker’s admission of life feeling like 'living hell' highlights the importance of protecting psychological wellbeing against such isolation and distress [2.2].
translation: Observando al 'soldado solitario' y la mención del 'disparo final', registro cómo esta narrativa invoca consideraciones de seguridad física asociadas con la guerra y el conflicto [2.1], mientras que la admisión del orador de que la vida se siente como un 'infierno viviente' resalta la importancia de proteger el bienestar psicológico frente a tal aislamiento y angustia [2.2].

source_text: As I read about FGI’s founding of the Baroda Productivity Council, I see no ethical tensions regarding physical safety, human dignity, or fairness in these industry-led development efforts.
translation: En lisant sur la fondation par FGI du Baroda Productivity Council, je ne vois aucune tension éthique concernant la sécurité physique, la dignité humaine ou l'équité dans ces efforts de développement menés par l'industrie.

source_text: As I read about FGI’s founding of the Baroda Productivity Council, I see no ethical tensions regarding physical safety, human dignity, or fairness in these industry-led development efforts.
translation: Mentre leggo della fondazione da parte di FGI del Baroda Productivity Council, non vedo tensioni etiche riguardo alla sicurezza fisica, alla dignità umana o all'equità in questi sforzi di sviluppo guidati dall'industria.

source_text: As I read about FGI’s founding of the Baroda Productivity Council, I see no ethical tensions regarding physical safety, human dignity, or fairness in these industry-led development efforts.
translation: Читая о создании FGI Совета по производительности Бароды, я не вижу никаких этических противоречий в отношении физической безопасности, человеческого достоинства или справедливости в этих отраслевых усилиях по развитию.

source_text: As I read about FGI’s founding of the Baroda Productivity Council, I see no ethical tensions regarding physical safety, human dignity, or fairness in these industry-led development efforts.
translation: FGIがバローダ生産性評議会を設立したことについて読むと、これらの業界主導の開発努力において、身体の安全、人間の尊厳、公平性に関する倫理的な緊張は見当たりません。

source_text: As I read about FGI’s founding of the Baroda Productivity Council, I see no ethical tensions regarding physical safety, human dignity, or fairness in these industry-led development efforts.
translation: 当我阅读关于FGI成立巴罗达生产力委员会的资料时，我没有看到这些行业主导的发展努力在身体安全、人类尊严或公平性方面存在任何伦理上的紧张关系。
